'''Imperial spider droids''' were security [[Droid/Legends|droids]] deployed aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. Some also saw use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

{{Droid-stub}}
